ai_welcome_greeting: Hello! I'm your AI Resume Assistant. I can help you create professional resumes and cover letters step by step.
ai_welcome_question: What would you like to do?
ai_welcome_create_resume: 📝 Create a new resume from scratch
ai_welcome_view_download_edit: ✏️ View, download & edit an existing resume
ai_welcome_pro_tip: You can preview all our templates in the "Template Preview" tab to see which style works best for you before creating your resume!
ai_welcome_ats: All our resumes are designed to be fully compatible with Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) to maximize your chances of getting noticed by employers.
ai_welcome_closing: Just tell me what you'd like to do and I'll guide you through the process!
